frame_analyses.description: Prof. Dieter Hahnloser speaking in interview setting with laparoscopic equipment in background
Hands demonstrating laparoscopic trainer setup and instrument handling outside trainer box
Medical professionals reviewing anatomical charts and laparoscopic imagery on monitor
3D rendered laparoscopic trainer with monitor showing surgical view

confidence_rationale: Clear instructional/marketing video with expert interview, equipment demonstrations, and product showcases. No actual FLS task performance observed.
technique_summary: This is educational/promotional content featuring expert discussion and equipment demonstration rather than task performance.

demonstrated_techniques: proper instrument handling outside the trainer
verbal_cues: Expert discussion visible through gesturing and presentation context
